expectations.text: Response identifies this as a Chat SDK issue
expectations.evidence: Title and body consistently reference '@tencentcloud/chat SDK' and 'Chat SDK' throughout the response.

expectations.text: Response identifies Web as the platform
expectations.evidence: Title starts with 'Web 端多 Tab 登录后' and Web platform is referenced throughout all steps.

expectations.text: Mentions the Web 10-instance limit or platform instance limits
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states 'Web 平台最多支持 10 个同时在线实例' and Step 5 reiterates '未超过 Web 平台的 10 个实例上限'.

expectations.text: References onKickedOffline callback as a diagnostic step
expectations.evidence: Step 2 is dedicated to checking KICKED_OFFLINE: 'chat.on(TencentCloudChat.EVENT.KICKED_OFFLINE, () => { console.warn("当前 Tab 被踢下线"); });' with branching based on whether callback fires.

expectations.text: Suggests checking getLoginStatus to verify login state
expectations.evidence: Step 3 explicitly shows 'const status = chat.getLoginStatus();' and checks against LOGIN_STATUS_LOGINED.

expectations.text: Gives a structured diagnostic flow with multiple branches, not just a single guess
expectations.evidence: Five numbered steps (Step 1–5) with branching logic: 'If callback triggered → go back to Step 1', 'If not triggered → continue Step 3', etc.

expectations.text: References a specific slice ID like chat/multi-instance (with-skill only)
expectations.evidence: Header references '参考知识：chat/multi-instance、chat/web/multi-instance' and footer references 'chat/login' and 'chat/event-listener'.
